name: nano-banana-prompt-generator
description: Generate professional Nano Banana / Gemini image generation prompts. Covers Nano Banana (gemini-2.5-flash-image), Nano Banana 2 (gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview), Nano Banana Pro (gemini-3-pro-image-preview), conversational editing, multi-character consistency, in-image translation, image search grounding, YouTube thumbnails, infographics, and Veo storyboard handoff.
